summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Schwab U.S. Large-Cap Value ETF (SCHV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of value stocks based on terms of projected, current and historical metrics. SCHV was launched on Dec 11, 2009 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

holdings.infoBox: SCHV is an equity ETF with a total of 562 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.07%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.93%, Berkshire Hathaway at 2.88%, ExxonMobil Holdings at 1.96%, and Johnson & Johnson at 1.95%.
